metadata.description: Display name for the workbook in Azure Monitor.
Source ID for the workbook. Use 'Azure Monitor' for cross-subscription workbooks.
GUID for the workbook resource. Leave as default to auto-generate.

| distinct location
| order by location asc", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "typeSettings": {"additionalResourceOptions": ["value::all"], "includeAll": true}, "defaultValue": "value::all", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources"}, {"id": "param-ostype", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "OsType", "label": "OS Type", "type": 2, "multiSelect": true, "quote": "'", "delimiter": ",", "query": "Resources

Hidden"}, {"type": 11, "content": {"version": "LinkItem/1.0", "style": "tabs", "links": [{"id": "tab-link-overview", "cellValue": "SelectedTab", "linkTarget": "parameter", "linkLabel": "Overview", "subTarget": "Overview", "style": "link", "isDefault": true}, {"id": "tab-link-summary", "cellValue": "SelectedTab", "linkTarget": "parameter", "linkLabel": "VM Summary", "subTarget": "VMSummary", "style": "link"}, {"id": "tab-link-network", "cellValue": "SelectedTab", "linkTarget": "parameter", "linkLabel": "🌐 Networking", "subTarget": "NetworkConfig", "style": "link"}, {"id": "tab-link-diskinv", "cellValue": "SelectedTab", "linkTarget": "parameter", "linkLabel": "💾 Disk Inventory", "subTarget": "DiskInventory", "style": "link"}]}, "name": "tab-navigation"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "# Welcome to the Azure VM Inventory Workbook"}, "name": "overview-title"}, {"type": 1, "content": {"json": "### Reference: [Azure Resource Graph — Virtual Machine queries](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/governance/resource-graph/samples/starter)", "style": "upsell"}, "name": "overview-reference"}, {"type": 1, "content": {"json": "The Azure VM Inventory Workbook provides a comprehensive inventory of all Azure Virtual Machines across your subscriptions, covering compute configuration, network topology, disk settings, and security posture. It is designed to help you quickly identify VM configurations, review resource allocations, and track your infrastructure across multiple subscriptions and resource groups.

## Workbook Objectives

* Enumerate all Azure Virtual Machines across selected subscriptions with full configuration details.
* Surface network topology including VNets, subnets, private IPs, and NIC configurations.
* Enable filtering by location, OS type, and power state for targeted analysis.
* Identify statically assigned IP addresses and accelerated networking configurations.
* Review per-disk inventory, disk counts, boot diagnostics, and installed VM extensions.
* Support export of findings for offline review and reporting.

> **Note:** This workbook is intended as a reference tool. Configuration changes should be reviewed and implemented according to your organization's policies and priorities.

**Enhanced version:** Adds parser-safe vCPU/core count, ESU billable cores, core size category, subnet IDs, and preserves disk/network/security fields for governance-ready exports."}, "name": "overview-description"}, {"type": 1, "content": {"json": "Indicates a Virtual Machine that is **running and reachable**. Use the **VM Summary** tab for aggregate counts and sub-tabs for inventory, SKU, boot diagnostics, and extensions.", "style": "success"}, "customWidth": "50", "styleSettings": {"margin": "10px", "showBorder": true}, "name": "overview-legend"}, {"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## 📋 Combined VM Inventory

A consolidated view of every VM across the selected subscriptions including details from **VM Summary**, **Networking**, and **Disk Inventory** in a single sortable, filterable, exportable table."}, "name": "overview-combined-header"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    VmName = name,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    VmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize),
    OsType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
    OSDiskGB = toint(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.diskSizeGB),
    OSDiskType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.managedDisk.storageAccountType),
    SecurityType = tostring(properties.securityProfile.securityType),
    License = tostring(properties.licenseType),
    PowerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code),
    ProvisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState),
    TagsJson = tostring(tags),
    VmId = tolower(tostring(id)),
    DataDiskCount = array_length(properties.storageProfile.dataDisks)
| where OsType in~ ({OsType})
| where PowerState in~ ({PowerState})
| where Location in~ ({Location})
| extend ParsedCores = toint(extract("[0-9]+", 0, VmSize))
| extend ConstrainedCores = toint(extract("-([0-9]+)", 1, VmSize))
| extend vCPUs = coalesce(ConstrainedCores, ParsedCores, 0)
| extend ESUBillableCores = iif(vCPUs == 0, 0, iif(vCPUs < 4, 4, vCPUs))
| extend CoreSizeCategory = case(vCPUs == 0, "Unknown", vCPUs <= 2, "Small", vCPUs <= 8, "Medium", vCPUs <= 16, "Large", "XL")
| join kind=leftouter (
    Resources
    | where type == "microsoft.network/networkinterfaces"
    | extend
        AcceleratedNetworking = tostring(properties.enableAcceleratedNetworking),
        IPForwarding = tostring(properties.enableIPForwarding),
        NsgName = extract(@"/networkSecurityGroups/([^/]+)$", 1, tostring(properties.networkSecurityGroup.id)),
        VmId = tolower(tostring(properties.virtualMachine.id)),
        NicName = name
    | where isnotempty(VmId)
    | mv-expand IpCfg = properties.ipConfigurations
    | extend
        PrivateIP = tostring(IpCfg.properties.privateIPAddress),
        IPAllocationMethod = tostring(IpCfg.properties.privateIPAllocationMethod),
        SubnetId = tostring(IpCfg.properties.subnet.id),
        VnetName = extract(@"/virtualNetworks/([^/]+)/", 1, tostring(IpCfg.properties.subnet.id)),
        SubnetName = extract(@"/subnets/([^/]+)$", 1, tostring(IpCfg.properties.subnet.id))
    | summarize
        NicNames = strcat_array(make_set(NicName), ", "),
        PrivateIPs = strcat_array(make_set(PrivateIP), ", "),
        IPAllocationMethods = strcat_array(make_set(IPAllocationMethod), ", "),
        StaticPrivateIPs = strcat_array(make_set_if(PrivateIP, IPAllocationMethod =~ "Static"), ", "),
        VNets = strcat_array(make_set(VnetName), ", "),
        Subnets = strcat_array(make_set(SubnetName), ", "),
        SubnetIds = strcat_array(make_set(SubnetId), ", "),
        AcceleratedNetworking = strcat_array(make_set(AcceleratedNetworking), ", "),
        IPForwarding = strcat_array(make_set(IPForwarding), ", "),
        NSGs = strcat_array(make_set(NsgName), ", ")
      by VmId
) on VmId
| join kind=leftouter (
    Resources
    | where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
    | extend VmId = tolower(tostring(id))
    | mv-expand DataDisk = properties.storageProfile.dataDisks
    | extend
        DataDiskSizeInline = toint(DataDisk.diskSizeGB),
        DataDiskId = tolower(tostring(DataDisk.managedDisk.id))
    | join kind=leftouter (
        Resources
        | where type == "microsoft.compute/disks"
        | project DiskId = tolower(tostring(id)), DiskSizeGB = toint(properties.diskSizeGB)
    ) on $left.DataDiskId == $right.DiskId
    | extend DataDiskSizeGB = coalesce(DataDiskSizeInline, DiskSizeGB, 0)
    | summarize TotalDataDiskGB = sum(DataDiskSizeGB) by VmId
) on VmId
| extend
    TotalDataDiskGB = coalesce(TotalDataDiskGB, 0),
    TotalStorageGB = coalesce(OSDiskGB, 0) + coalesce(TotalDataDiskGB, 0)
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project
    SubscriptionName,
    subscriptionId,
    VmName,
    ResourceGroup,
    Location,
    VmSize,
    vCPUs,
    ESUBillableCores,
    CoreSizeCategory,
    OsType,
    PowerState,
    ProvisioningState,
    OSDiskGB,
    OSDiskType,
    DataDiskCount,
    TotalDataDiskGB,
    TotalStorageGB,
    SecurityType,
    License,
    NicNames,
    PrivateIPs,
    IPAllocationMethods,
    StaticPrivateIPs,
    VNets,
    Subnets,
    SubnetIds,
    AcceleratedNetworking,
    IPForwarding,
    NSGs,
    TagsJson
| order by SubscriptionName, VmName", "size": 0, "title": "Combined VM Inventory (Summary + Networking + Disks + Cores)", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "parameter", "linkLabel": "🧮 Core Governance", "subTarget": "CoreGovernance", "style": "link"}]}, "name": "summary-subtab-nav"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## VM Summary

Aggregate tile view of VM counts by power state and OS type across the selected subscriptions."}, "name": "summary-header"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    OsType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
    PowerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code)
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Running = countif(PowerState =~ 'PowerState/running'),
    Deallocated = countif(PowerState =~ 'PowerState/deallocated'),
    Stopped = countif(PowerState =~ 'PowerState/stopped'),
    Windows = countif(OsType =~ 'Windows'),
    Linux = countif(OsType =~ 'Linux')
| extend Rows = pack_array(
    pack('Metric', 'Total VMs', 'Value', Total),
    pack('Metric', 'Powered On', 'Value', Running),
    pack('Metric', 'Deallocated', 'Value', Deallocated),
    pack('Metric', 'Stopped', 'Value', Stopped),
    pack('Metric', 'Windows VMs', 'Value', Windows),
    pack('Metric', 'Linux VMs', 'Value', Linux)
  )
| mv-expand Rows
| project Metric = tostring(Rows.Metric), Value = toint(Rows.Value)", "size": 4, "title": "VM Counts", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "visualization": "tiles", "tileSettings": {"titleContent": {"columnMatch": "Metric", "formatter": 1}, "leftContent": {"columnMatch": "Value", "formatter": 12, "formatOptions": {"palette": "auto"}, "numberFormat": {"unit": 17, "options": {"maximumSignificantDigits": 3, "maximumFractionDigits": 2}}}, "showBorder": true, "size": "auto"}}, "name": "summary-tiles"}]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "SummarySubTab", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "Summary"}, "name": "summary-subgroup"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## 🖥️ VM Inventory

Full table of VMs including VM size, OS details, provisioning state, power state, disk summary, NIC configuration, and tags."}, "name": "inventory-header"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    VmName = name,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    VmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize),
    OsType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
    OSDiskGB = toint(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.diskSizeGB),
    OSDiskType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.managedDisk.storageAccountType),
    SecurityType = tostring(properties.securityProfile.securityType),
    License = tostring(properties.licenseType),
    PowerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code),
    ProvisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState),
    TagsJson = tostring(tags),
    VmId = tolower(tostring(id)),
    DataDiskCount = array_length(properties.storageProfile.dataDisks)
| where OsType in~ ({OsType})
| where PowerState in~ ({PowerState})
| where Location in~ ({Location})
| extend ParsedCores = toint(extract("[0-9]+", 0, VmSize))
| extend ConstrainedCores = toint(extract("-([0-9]+)", 1, VmSize))
| extend vCPUs = coalesce(ConstrainedCores, ParsedCores, 0)
| extend ESUBillableCores = iif(vCPUs == 0, 0, iif(vCPUs < 4, 4, vCPUs))
| extend CoreSizeCategory = case(vCPUs == 0, "Unknown", vCPUs <= 2, "Small", vCPUs <= 8, "Medium", vCPUs <= 16, "Large", "XL")
| join kind=leftouter (
    Resources
    | where type == "microsoft.network/networkinterfaces"
    | extend
        AcceleratedNetworking = tostring(properties.enableAcceleratedNetworking),
        IPForwarding = tostring(properties.enableIPForwarding),
        NsgName = extract(@"/networkSecurityGroups/([^/]+)$", 1, tostring(properties.networkSecurityGroup.id)),
        VmId = tolower(tostring(properties.virtualMachine.id)),
        NicName = name
    | where isnotempty(VmId)
    | mv-expand IpCfg = properties.ipConfigurations
    | extend
        PrivateIP = tostring(IpCfg.properties.privateIPAddress),
        IPAllocationMethod = tostring(IpCfg.properties.privateIPAllocationMethod),
        SubnetId = tostring(IpCfg.properties.subnet.id),
        VnetName = extract(@"/virtualNetworks/([^/]+)/", 1, tostring(IpCfg.properties.subnet.id)),
        SubnetName = extract(@"/subnets/([^/]+)$", 1, tostring(IpCfg.properties.subnet.id))
    | summarize
        NicNames = strcat_array(make_set(NicName), ", "),
        PrivateIPs = strcat_array(make_set(PrivateIP), ", "),
        IPAllocationMethods = strcat_array(make_set(IPAllocationMethod), ", "),
        StaticPrivateIPs = strcat_array(make_set_if(PrivateIP, IPAllocationMethod =~ "Static"), ", "),
        VNets = strcat_array(make_set(VnetName), ", "),
        Subnets = strcat_array(make_set(SubnetName), ", "),
        SubnetIds = strcat_array(make_set(SubnetId), ", "),
        AcceleratedNetworking = strcat_array(make_set(AcceleratedNetworking), ", "),
        IPForwarding = strcat_array(make_set(IPForwarding), ", "),
        NSGs = strcat_array(make_set(NsgName), ", ")
      by VmId
) on VmId
| join kind=leftouter (
    Resources
    | where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
    | extend VmId = tolower(tostring(id))
    | mv-expand DataDisk = properties.storageProfile.dataDisks
    | extend
        DataDiskSizeInline = toint(DataDisk.diskSizeGB),
        DataDiskId = tolower(tostring(DataDisk.managedDisk.id))
    | join kind=leftouter (
        Resources
        | where type == "microsoft.compute/disks"
        | project DiskId = tolower(tostring(id)), DiskSizeGB = toint(properties.diskSizeGB)
    ) on $left.DataDiskId == $right.DiskId
    | extend DataDiskSizeGB = coalesce(DataDiskSizeInline, DiskSizeGB, 0)
    | summarize TotalDataDiskGB = sum(DataDiskSizeGB) by VmId
) on VmId
| extend
    TotalDataDiskGB = coalesce(TotalDataDiskGB, 0),
    TotalStorageGB = coalesce(OSDiskGB, 0) + coalesce(TotalDataDiskGB, 0)
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project
    SubscriptionName,
    subscriptionId,
    VmName,

    VmSize,
    vCPUs,

    IPAllocationMethods,
    StaticPrivateIPs,
    VNets,

    SubnetIds,

    IPForwarding,
    NSGs,
    TagsJson

Distribution of VM SKUs (sizes) and per-VM SKU details including OS type, location, and power state."}, "name": "sku-header"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    VmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize),
    OsType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
    PowerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code)
| where OsType in~ ({OsType})
| where PowerState in~ ({PowerState})
| where location in~ ({Location})
| summarize VMCount = count() by VmSize
| order by VMCount desc", "size": 3, "title": "VM Count by SKU", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "visualization": "barchart", "chartSettings": {"xAxis": "VmSize", "yAxis": ["VMCount"], "seriesLabelSettings": [{"seriesName": "VMCount", "label": "VM Count"}]}}, "customWidth": "50", "name": "sku-chart"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    VmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize),
    OsType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
    PowerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code)
| where OsType in~ ({OsType})
| where PowerState in~ ({PowerState})
| where location in~ ({Location})
| extend ParsedCores = toint(extract("[0-9]+", 0, VmSize))
| extend ConstrainedCores = toint(extract("-([0-9]+)", 1, VmSize))
| extend vCPUs = coalesce(ConstrainedCores, ParsedCores, 0)
| extend ESUBillableCores = iif(vCPUs == 0, 0, iif(vCPUs < 4, 4, vCPUs))
| extend CoreSizeCategory = case(vCPUs == 0, "Unknown", vCPUs <= 2, "Small", vCPUs <= 8, "Medium", vCPUs <= 16, "Large", "XL")
| summarize
    VMCount = count(),
    CoresPerVM = any(vCPUs),
    TotalvCPUs = sum(vCPUs),
    TotalESUBillableCores = sum(ESUBillableCores),
    WindowsCount = countif(OsType =~ 'Windows'),
    LinuxCount = countif(OsType =~ 'Linux')
  by VmSize
| order by VMCount desc", "size": 3, "title": "SKU Summary", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "showExportToExcel": true, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"filter": true, "labelSettings": [{"columnId": "VmSize", "label": "VM SKU"}, {"columnId": "VMCount", "label": "Total VMs"}, {"columnId": "CoresPerVM", "label": "Cores per VM"}, {"columnId": "TotalvCPUs", "label": "Total vCPUs / Cores"}, {"columnId": "TotalESUBillableCores", "label": "Total ESU Billable Cores"}, {"columnId": "WindowsCount", "label": "Windows"}, {"columnId": "LinuxCount", "label": "Linux"}]}}, "customWidth": "50", "name": "sku-summary"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    VmName = name,

    OsType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
    PowerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code)
| where OsType in~ ({OsType})
| where PowerState in~ ({PowerState})
| where location in~ ({Location})
| extend ParsedCores = toint(extract("[0-9]+", 0, VmSize))
| extend ConstrainedCores = toint(extract("-([0-9]+)", 1, VmSize))
| extend vCPUs = coalesce(ConstrainedCores, ParsedCores, 0)
| extend ESUBillableCores = iif(vCPUs == 0, 0, iif(vCPUs < 4, 4, vCPUs))
| extend CoreSizeCategory = case(vCPUs == 0, "Unknown", vCPUs <= 2, "Small", vCPUs <= 8, "Medium", vCPUs <= 16, "Large", "XL")
| join kind=leftouter (

Boot diagnostics status per VM — enabled/disabled, managed vs. custom storage URI."}, "name": "bootdiag-header"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    BootDiagEnabled = tostring(properties.diagnosticsProfile.bootDiagnostics.enabled),
    BootDiagStorageUri = tostring(properties.diagnosticsProfile.bootDiagnostics.storageUri)
| extend BootDiagType = case(
    BootDiagEnabled =~ "true" and BootDiagStorageUri == "", "Managed",
    BootDiagEnabled =~ "true", "Custom",
    "Disabled")
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project
    SubscriptionName,
    VmName = name,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    BootDiagEnabled,
    BootDiagType,
    BootDiagStorageUri
| order by SubscriptionName, VmName", "size": 0, "title": "Boot Diagnostics Status", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "showExportToExcel": true, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"filter": true, "labelSettings": [{"columnId": "SubscriptionName", "label": "Subscription"}, {"columnId": "VmName", "label": "VM Name"}, {"columnId": "ResourceGroup", "label": "Resource Group"}, {"columnId": "Location", "label": "Location"}, {"columnId": "BootDiagEnabled", "label": "Enabled"}, {"columnId": "BootDiagType", "label": "Storage Type"}, {"columnId": "BootDiagStorageUri", "label": "Storage URI"}]}}, "name": "bootdiag-grid"}]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "SummarySubTab", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "BootDiag"}, "name": "bootdiag-subgroup"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## 🔌 VM Extensions

Installed VM extensions per VM — publisher, type, version, provisioning state, and auto-upgrade setting."}, "name": "extensions-header"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions"
| extend
    VmName = extract(@"/virtualMachines/([^/]+)/", 1, id),
    Publisher = tostring(properties.publisher),
    ExtType = tostring(properties.type),
    TypeHandlerVersion = tostring(properties.typeHandlerVersion),
    ProvisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState),
    AutoUpgrade = tostring(properties.enableAutomaticUpgrade)
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project
    SubscriptionName,
    VmName,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    ExtensionName = name,
    Publisher,
    ExtType,
    TypeHandlerVersion,
    ProvisioningState,
    AutoUpgrade
| order by SubscriptionName, VmName, ExtensionName", "size": 0, "title": "VM Extensions", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "showExportToExcel": true, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"filter": true, "labelSettings": [{"columnId": "SubscriptionName", "label": "Subscription"}, {"columnId": "VmName", "label": "VM Name"}, {"columnId": "ResourceGroup", "label": "Resource Group"}, {"columnId": "Location", "label": "Location"}, {"columnId": "ExtensionName", "label": "Extension Name"}, {"columnId": "Publisher", "label": "Publisher"}, {"columnId": "ExtType", "label": "Type"}, {"columnId": "TypeHandlerVersion", "label": "Version"}, {"columnId": "ProvisioningState", "label": "Provisioning State"}, {"columnId": "AutoUpgrade", "label": "Auto Upgrade"}]}}, "name": "extensions-grid"}]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "SummarySubTab", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "VMExtensions"}, "name": "extensions-subgroup"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## 🏷️ Azure Hybrid Benefit (AHB) Status

License type per VM indicating Azure Hybrid Benefit usage. `Windows_Server`, `Windows_Client`, `RHEL_BYOS`, `SLES_BYOS` indicate AHB is **enabled**; empty/`None` means **not enabled** (PAYG)."}, "name": "ahb-header"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    OsType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
    PowerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code),
    License = tostring(properties.licenseType)
| where OsType in~ ({OsType})
| where PowerState in~ ({PowerState})
| where location in~ ({Location})
| extend AHBStatus = case(
    isempty(License) or License =~ "None", "Not Enabled (PAYG)",
    License in~ ("Windows_Server", "Windows_Client", "RHEL_BYOS", "SLES_BYOS", "RHEL_ELS_6", "SLES_STANDARD"), "Enabled",
    License)
| summarize VMCount = count() by AHBStatus
| order by VMCount desc", "size": 4, "title": "AHB Status Summary", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "visualization": "tiles", "tileSettings": {"titleContent": {"columnMatch": "AHBStatus", "formatter": 1}, "leftContent": {"columnMatch": "VMCount", "formatter": 12, "formatOptions": {"palette": "auto"}}, "showBorder": true, "size": "auto"}}, "name": "ahb-tiles"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    VmName = name,
    OsType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
    PowerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code),
    VmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize),
    License = tostring(properties.licenseType)
| where OsType in~ ({OsType})
| where PowerState in~ ({PowerState})
| where location in~ ({Location})
| extend ParsedCores = toint(extract("[0-9]+", 0, VmSize))
| extend ConstrainedCores = toint(extract("-([0-9]+)", 1, VmSize))
| extend vCPUs = coalesce(ConstrainedCores, ParsedCores, 0)
| extend ESUBillableCores = iif(vCPUs == 0, 0, iif(vCPUs < 4, 4, vCPUs))
| extend CoreSizeCategory = case(vCPUs == 0, "Unknown", vCPUs <= 2, "Small", vCPUs <= 8, "Medium", vCPUs <= 16, "Large", "XL")
| extend AHBStatus = case(
    isempty(License) or License =~ "None", "Not Enabled (PAYG)",
    License in~ ("Windows_Server", "Windows_Client", "RHEL_BYOS", "SLES_BYOS", "RHEL_ELS_6", "SLES_STANDARD"), "Enabled",
    License)
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project
    SubscriptionName,
    VmName,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    OsType,
    VmSize,
    vCPUs,
    ESUBillableCores,
    CoreSizeCategory,
    PowerState,
    License,
    AHBStatus
| order by AHBStatus asc, SubscriptionName, VmName", "size": 0, "title": "AHB Status per VM", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "showExportToExcel": true, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"filter": true, "labelSettings": [{"columnId": "SubscriptionName", "label": "Subscription"}, {"columnId": "VmName", "label": "VM Name"}, {"columnId": "ResourceGroup", "label": "Resource Group"}, {"columnId": "Location", "label": "Location"}, {"columnId": "OsType", "label": "OS Type"}, {"columnId": "VmSize", "label": "VM Size"}, {"columnId": "vCPUs", "label": "vCPUs / Cores"}, {"columnId": "ESUBillableCores", "label": "ESU Billable Cores"}, {"columnId": "CoreSizeCategory", "label": "Core Size Category"}, {"columnId": "PowerState", "label": "Power State"}, {"columnId": "License", "label": "License Type"}, {"columnId": "AHBStatus", "label": "AHB Status"}]}}, "name": "ahb-grid"}]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "SummarySubTab", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "AHB"}, "name": "ahb-subgroup"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## 🧮 Core Governance

Final parser-safe core-count view derived from VM SKU. Keeps default disk/network fields while adding vCPU, ESU billable cores, and size category for ESU, ACR, migration planning, and cost governance reviews."}, "name": "coregov-header"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    VmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize),
    OsType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
    PowerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code)
| where OsType in~ ({OsType})
| where PowerState in~ ({PowerState})
| where location in~ ({Location})
| extend ParsedCores = toint(extract("[0-9]+", 0, VmSize))
| extend ConstrainedCores = toint(extract("-([0-9]+)", 1, VmSize))
| extend vCPUs = coalesce(ConstrainedCores, ParsedCores, 0)
| extend ESUBillableCores = iif(vCPUs == 0, 0, iif(vCPUs < 4, 4, vCPUs))
| extend CoreSizeCategory = case(vCPUs == 0, "Unknown", vCPUs <= 2, "Small", vCPUs <= 8, "Medium", vCPUs <= 16, "Large", "XL")
| summarize
    TotalVMs = count(),
    TotalvCPUs = sum(vCPUs),
    TotalESUBillableCores = sum(ESUBillableCores),
    SmallVMs = countif(CoreSizeCategory == "Small"),
    MediumVMs = countif(CoreSizeCategory == "Medium"),
    LargeVMs = countif(CoreSizeCategory == "Large"),
    XLVMs = countif(CoreSizeCategory == "XL"),
    UnknownCoreVMs = countif(CoreSizeCategory == "Unknown")
| extend Rows = pack_array(
    pack("Metric", "Total VMs", "Value", TotalVMs),
    pack("Metric", "Total vCPUs / Cores", "Value", TotalvCPUs),
    pack("Metric", "ESU Billable Cores", "Value", TotalESUBillableCores),
    pack("Metric", "Small VMs (<=2 cores)", "Value", SmallVMs),
    pack("Metric", "Medium VMs (3-8 cores)", "Value", MediumVMs),
    pack("Metric", "Large VMs (9-16 cores)", "Value", LargeVMs),
    pack("Metric", "XL VMs (>16 cores)", "Value", XLVMs),
    pack("Metric", "Unknown Core Mapping", "Value", UnknownCoreVMs)
)
| mv-expand Rows
| project Metric = tostring(Rows.Metric), Value = toint(Rows.Value)", "size": 4, "title": "Core Governance Summary", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "visualization": "tiles", "tileSettings": {"titleContent": {"columnMatch": "Metric", "formatter": 1}, "leftContent": {"columnMatch": "Value", "formatter": 12, "formatOptions": {"palette": "auto"}}, "showBorder": true, "size": "auto"}}, "name": "coregov-tiles"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    VmName = name,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    VmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize),
    OsType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType),
    PowerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code),
    License = tostring(properties.licenseType)
| where OsType in~ ({OsType})
| where PowerState in~ ({PowerState})
| where location in~ ({Location})
| extend ParsedCores = toint(extract("[0-9]+", 0, VmSize))
| extend ConstrainedCores = toint(extract("-([0-9]+)", 1, VmSize))
| extend vCPUs = coalesce(ConstrainedCores, ParsedCores, 0)
| extend ESUBillableCores = iif(vCPUs == 0, 0, iif(vCPUs < 4, 4, vCPUs))
| extend CoreSizeCategory = case(vCPUs == 0, "Unknown", vCPUs <= 2, "Small", vCPUs <= 8, "Medium", vCPUs <= 16, "Large", "XL")
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project
    SubscriptionName,
    subscriptionId,
    VmName,
    ResourceGroup,
    Location,
    VmSize,
    vCPUs,
    ESUBillableCores,
    CoreSizeCategory,
    OsType,
    PowerState,
    License
| order by SubscriptionName, VmName", "size": 0, "title": "Core Governance per VM", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "showExportToExcel": true, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"filter": true, "labelSettings": [{"columnId": "SubscriptionName", "label": "Subscription"}, {"columnId": "subscriptionId", "label": "Subscription ID"}, {"columnId": "VmName", "label": "VM Name"}, {"columnId": "ResourceGroup", "label": "Resource Group"}, {"columnId": "Location", "label": "Location"}, {"columnId": "VmSize", "label": "VM Size"}, {"columnId": "vCPUs", "label": "vCPUs / Cores"}, {"columnId": "ESUBillableCores", "label": "ESU Billable Cores"}, {"columnId": "CoreSizeCategory", "label": "Core Size Category"}, {"columnId": "OsType", "label": "OS Type"}, {"columnId": "PowerState", "label": "Power State"}, {"columnId": "License", "label": "License Type"}]}}, "name": "coregov-grid"}]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "SummarySubTab", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "CoreGovernance"}, "name": "coregov-subgroup"}]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "SelectedTab", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "VMSummary"}, "name": "vmsummary-parent-group"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "items": [{"type": 11, "content": {"version": "LinkItem/1.0", "style": "tabs", "links": [{"id": "subtab-netconfig", "cellValue": "NetworkSubTab", "linkTarget": "parameter", "linkLabel": "🌐 Network Configuration", "subTarget": "NetworkConfig", "style": "link", "isDefault": true}]}, "name": "network-subtab-nav"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## 🌐 Network Configuration

Per-NIC view of VNet, subnet, private IP, NSG, accelerated networking, and IP forwarding settings."}, "name": "network-header"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.network/networkinterfaces"
| extend
    AcceleratedNetworking = tostring(properties.enableAcceleratedNetworking),
    IPForwarding = tostring(properties.enableIPForwarding),
    NsgId = tostring(properties.networkSecurityGroup.id),
    AttachedVM = tostring(properties.virtualMachine.id)
| extend
    NsgName = extract(@"/networkSecurityGroups/([^/]+)$", 1, NsgId),
    VmName = extract(@"/virtualMachines/([^/]+)$", 1, AttachedVM)
| mv-expand IpCfg = properties.ipConfigurations
| extend
    PrivateIP = tostring(IpCfg.properties.privateIPAddress),
    IPAllocationMethod = tostring(IpCfg.properties.privateIPAllocationMethod),
    SubnetId = tostring(IpCfg.properties.subnet.id)
| extend
    VnetName = extract(@"/virtualNetworks/([^/]+)/", 1, SubnetId),
    SubnetName = extract(@"/subnets/([^/]+)$", 1, SubnetId)
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project
    SubscriptionName,
    VmName,
    NicName = name,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    PrivateIP,
    IPAllocationMethod,
    VnetName,
    SubnetName,
    AcceleratedNetworking,
    IPForwarding,
    NsgName
| order by SubscriptionName, VmName", "size": 0, "title": "Network Interface Configuration", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "showExportToExcel": true, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"filter": true, "labelSettings": [{"columnId": "SubscriptionName", "label": "Subscription"}, {"columnId": "VmName", "label": "VM Name"}, {"columnId": "NicName", "label": "NIC Name"}, {"columnId": "ResourceGroup", "label": "Resource Group"}, {"columnId": "Location", "label": "Location"}, {"columnId": "PrivateIP", "label": "Private IP"}, {"columnId": "IPAllocationMethod", "label": "IP Allocation"}, {"columnId": "VnetName", "label": "VNet"}, {"columnId": "SubnetName", "label": "Subnet"}, {"columnId": "AcceleratedNetworking", "label": "Accelerated Networking"}, {"columnId": "IPForwarding", "label": "IP Forwarding"}, {"columnId": "NsgName", "label": "NSG"}]}}, "name": "network-grid"}]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "NetworkSubTab", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "NetworkConfig"}, "name": "network-subgroup"}]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "SelectedTab", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "NetworkConfig"}, "name": "network-parent-group"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## 🔢 Disk Count & Size Per VM

Aggregated view showing OS disk and data disk counts with total storage per VM."}, "name": "diskcount-header"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Resources
| where type == "microsoft.compute/virtualmachines"
| extend
    VmName = name,
    OsDiskSizeGBInline = toint(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.diskSizeGB),
    OsDiskTypeInline = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.managedDisk.storageAccountType),
    OsDiskId = tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.managedDisk.id)),
    DataDiskCount = array_length(properties.storageProfile.dataDisks),
    DataDisks = iff(array_length(properties.storageProfile.dataDisks) == 0,
                    dynamic([{"diskSizeGB": 0, "managedDisk": {"id": ""}}]),
                    properties.storageProfile.dataDisks)
| mv-expand DataDisk = DataDisks
| extend
    DataDiskSizeInline = toint(DataDisk.diskSizeGB),
    DataDiskId = tolower(tostring(DataDisk.managedDisk.id))
| join kind=leftouter (
    Resources
    | where type == "microsoft.compute/disks"
    | project DiskId = tolower(tostring(id)), DiskSizeGB = toint(properties.diskSizeGB), DiskSku = tostring(sku.name)
) on $left.DataDiskId == $right.DiskId
| extend DataDiskSizeGB = coalesce(DataDiskSizeInline, DiskSizeGB, 0)
| summarize
    OsDiskIdAny = any(OsDiskId),
    OsDiskSizeInlineAny = any(OsDiskSizeGBInline),
    OsDiskTypeInlineAny = any(OsDiskTypeInline),
    DataDiskCount = any(DataDiskCount),
    TotalDataDiskGB = iff(any(DataDiskCount) == 0, 0, sum(DataDiskSizeGB))
  by subscriptionId, VmName, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Location = location
| join kind=leftouter (
    Resources
    | where type == "microsoft.compute/disks"
    | project OsDiskIdAny = tolower(tostring(id)), OsDiskSizeFromResource = toint(properties.diskSizeGB), OsDiskSkuFromResource = tostring(sku.name)
) on OsDiskIdAny
| extend
    OsDiskSizeGB = coalesce(OsDiskSizeInlineAny, OsDiskSizeFromResource, 0),
    OsDiskType = coalesce(OsDiskTypeInlineAny, OsDiskSkuFromResource, "")
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project
    SubscriptionName,
    VmName,
    ResourceGroup,
    Location,
    OsDiskSizeGB,
    OsDiskType,
    DataDiskCount,
    TotalDataDiskGB,
    TotalStorageGB = OsDiskSizeGB + TotalDataDiskGB
| order by SubscriptionName, VmName", "size": 0, "title": "Disk Count & Size Per VM", "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscriptions}"], "showExportToExcel": true, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"filter": true, "labelSettings": [{"columnId": "SubscriptionName", "label": "Subscription"}, {"columnId": "VmName", "label": "VM Name"}, {"columnId": "ResourceGroup", "label": "Resource Group"}, {"columnId": "Location", "label": "Location"}, {"columnId": "OsDiskSizeGB", "label": "OS Disk (GB)"}, {"columnId": "OsDiskType", "label": "OS Disk Type"}, {"columnId": "DataDiskCount", "label": "Data Disk Count"}, {"columnId": "TotalDataDiskGB", "label": "Data Disks Total (GB)"}, {"columnId": "TotalStorageGB", "label": "Total Storage (GB)"}]}}, "name": "diskcount-grid"}]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "SelectedTab", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "DiskInventory"}, "name": "disk-parent-group"}], "fallbackResourceIds": ["azure monitor"], "$schema": "https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
